2024-25 Norfolk State Spartans Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 24-11 (11-3, 1st in MEAC MBB)

Coach: Robert Jones

PS/G: 77.0 (91st of 364)

PA/G: 69.7 (102nd of 364)

SRS: -3.71 (198th of 364)

SOS: -6.65 (305th of 364)

ORtg: 112.2 (73rd of 364)

DRtg: 101.6 (89th of 364)

NCAA Tournament: (#16 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (95-69) versus #1 Florida

  • MEAC Reg Season Champ
  • MEAC Tourney Champ
